---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for AuthShield Lab
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. How would you use it?

## Module Impact

Which module(s) would this feature affect?

- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] User Management
- [ ] Session Management
- [ ] Attack Simulations
- [ ] Defense Mechanisms
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Reports
- [ ] Learning Center
- [ ] Audit Trail
- [ ] Timeline
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Help
- [ ] Other: _________

## User Role Impact

Which user role(s) would benefit from this feature?

- [ ] Student
- [ ] Instructor
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] Developer

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting
